name: Boston Chicken & KFC Rotisserie Whole Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill the cavity of the whole chicken with apple, onion, and celery.
2. Place the chicken in a Pam-sprayed Dutch oven or roasting pan deep enough to seal later without touching the skin.
3. Follow the Rotisserie Chicken (Boston Chicken & KFC) recipe for cooking the chicken breasts at 350°F.
4. Cook for an hour plus 15 to 30 minutes, depending on the size of the chicken.
5. Ensure the chicken is nicely browned before serving. Alternatively, use Reynolds' Oven Bags and follow the included instructions.
